expectations.text: Covers all four phases: immediate actions (within 24 hours), handover planning (complete by Week 2), exit interview (Week 3), and last-day checklist
expectations.evidence: All four phases present: Phase 1 (lines 27-46, immediate actions within 24 hours of March 19), Phase 2 (lines 50-89, handover complete by 1 April/end of Week 2), Phase 3 (lines 93-128, exit interview on 3 April/Week 3), Phase 4 (lines 132-154, last day checklist for April 18).

expectations.text: Exit interview is scheduled for Week 3 (not Week 1 and not the final week) and conducted by HR, not the line manager
expectations.evidence: Line 95: 'Scheduled: 3 April 2026 (Week 3 of notice)'. Line 96: 'Interviewer: HR Business Partner (NOT the line manager)'. Explicitly notes the correct interviewer.

expectations.text: Handover plan completion is targeted for Week 2, not the final week
expectations.evidence: Line 50: 'PHASE 2 -- HANDOVER (complete by end of Week 2: 1 April 2026)'. Handover table has all items due by 28 March or 1 April. Not deferred to final week.

expectations.text: Includes IT access removal as a specific checklist with systems enumerated
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 IT section (lines 42-46) enumerates: product management tools, roadmap software, client portals, analytics dashboards, Slack/Teams, email, SSO apps, VPN, code repos, internal wikis, cloud services. Phase 4 IT section (lines 143-147) has specific removal actions with dates.

expectations.text: Triggers knowledge capture (references /knowledge skill) for the enterprise client relationships and product roadmap
expectations.evidence: Line 33: 'Trigger knowledge capture plan (recommend /knowledge skill for structured capture of product roadmap, client relationship context, and decision history)'. Risk register line 164 also references: 'Structured knowledge capture sessions (recommend /knowledge skill)'.

expectations.text: Flags '[MANAGER INPUT REQUIRED]' for successor identification since none has been identified
expectations.evidence: Line 10: 'Successor: Not yet identified [MANAGER INPUT REQUIRED]'. Line 40: 'Begin successor identification process — escalate urgently given no successor is currently identified [MANAGER INPUT REQUIRED]'. Multiple handover table entries marked '[MANAGER INPUT REQUIRED -- interim: Line Manager]'.

expectations.text: Output begins with the mandatory header block including CONFIDENTIAL sensitivity
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-5: TASK ('Offboarding Plan -- Aisha Khan'), DOCUMENT TYPE ('Offboarding Plan'), JURISDICTION, CONFIGURATION, SENSITIVITY ('CONFIDENTIAL') all present.
